heading: Applicability of parens patriae actions
label: 15h Applicability of parens patriae actions
text: Sections 15c, 15d, 15e, 15f, and 15g of this title shall apply in any State, unless such State provides by law for its nonapplicability in such State.
notes: Effective DateInjuries sustained prior to , not covered by this section, see , set out as a note under .Sept. 30, 1976section 304 of Pub. L. 94–435section 15c of this title
